title: Manufacturing Engineer - ITC Limited - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - ITC Limited - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
ITC Limited has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ITC Limited:
ITC Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Limited!
